events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate scenario: Measurement check grounding electrode system industrial site. Gauge shown near grounding electrode system, needle and scale out of focus. Work order references a limit, yet no readable value or second measurement provided. Reference NEC 250.50-250.68. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since no readable value, cannot verify compliance. Need more info. Risk? Grounding electrode system is critical safety; inability to read measurement means cannot confirm continuity/resistance. Could be high risk? But condition not necessarily defective, just unverifiable. Risk maybe medium or high. Need decide. Decision must be fail if dangerous or non-compliant. Is it non-compliant? The gauge being out of focus isn't installation non-compliance; it's measurement unverifiable. So decision needs_more_info. Risk: high because grounding electrode system affects safety and shock hazard; missing verification could conceal critical defect. Work_stage rough-complete. percent_complete maybe 80? Component conditions none flagged -> empty list. value 0 (no reading). sound_source irrelevant empty? Schema string maybe ""? We can put "" or "none". event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty. findings: gauge unreadable, no measurement value, cannot verify electrode resistance/continuity against spec. actions: re-take focused photo/read gauge, obtain calibrated measurement, compare to work order limit, verify NEC 250.50-250.68. rationale: insufficient evidence. references NEC 250.50-250.68. Need ensure JSON valid.
